title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition introduced FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and meets production standards, not just whether it passes tests. It uses blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics on tasks from 36 open-source repositories.
